productName: Green Reaper Live Resin Badder - Strawberry Cough - 1g
description: Whipped sativa badder from Strawberry Cough with the look and feel of cake batter — gold, creamy, and scoop-ready, agitated to coax out maximum aroma. Creamy, terpy, and easy to handle — with notes of strawberry, sweet, and berry, with a clear, creative buzz.
